title: Four Democrats file to run in primary for Syracuse Common Council
summary: Four Democratic candidates have filed to run in a primary election for a Syracuse Common Council seat, the only council election scheduled for 2026. This procedural announcement indicates active electoral engagement in local governance.

political_signal.description: Multiple Democratic candidates filing for single open seat suggests competitive local engagement and active political participation in city governance
